name: the-librarian
description: Durable memory + cross-harness handoffs for Codex, backed by a remote Librarian MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Durable memory + cross-harness handoffs for Codex
interface.longDescription: The Librarian gives Codex a remote memory layer (recall / remember / flag_memory) plus four user-facing verbs (/handoff, /takeover, /learn, /toggle-private). A per-turn conv-state injection hook keeps the model aware of the current domain across compactions. Sibling to the Claude Code, Hermes, OpenCode, and Pi plugins; handoffs round-trip cleanly between them.
defaultPrompt: Recall what we know about the current project and pick up any pending handoff in this cwd.
